creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: Turns out to be a kernel bug. In FUSE protocol 7.9 and above, FUSE_GETATTR has a larger payload.  We aren't sending the entire payload.  I never noticed until now, because the extra fields are all always 0.  But fusefs-lkl checks the overall size and complains.  Most fuse daemons don't.
